title: Research & Valuation Decision Schema
description: Schema for a deep research and valuation tool, focused on Buy/Pass decisions and market intelligence.

identification.description: Clear, accurate, human-readable name of the item. No SEO stuffing.

liquidity_score.description: How fast this item typically sells (1 = very slow, 10 = instant).

target_buy_price.description: Maximum recommended purchase price to ensure a healthy margin (e.g., 'Max Buy: $15').

comp_search_keywords.description: 3-5 exact phrases for checking Sold Item comps.

visible_flaws.description: Objective list of visible condition issues.

dealer_gut_check.description: The cynical, expert assessment of why it's worth buying or passing.

research_pathways.description: Specific databases, steps, or archives to consult for verification.
